name: Hearthcoil Commune
identity: A marginal Sheresh commune surviving around unstable heat coils and strict ration discipline.
approach: Steam plumes and patched outer shell plates suggest a place held together by labor and necessity.
inside: Warmth is uneven, storage is precious, and every room reflects compromise.
expected_behavior: do not obstruct heat distribution teams
seasonal_change: Severe cold magnifies internal inequity and equipment strain.

sensory_surface.detail: Steam plumes and patched outer shell plates suggest a place held together by labor and necessity.
Warmth is uneven, storage is precious, and every room reflects compromise.

social_expectation_surface.detail: do not obstruct heat distribution teams

public_behavior_texture: People who belong here are usually repair crews, ration clerks, families under heat quotas, and public conduct is read through expectations such as waste nothing, do not obstruct heat distribution teams.
visible_power_signals: Ordinary decisions are visibly shaped by Communal Ration Allocators.
local_tension_surface: The place feels stable only until pressures such as coil failure, ration conflict, out-migration begin showing through daily routines.
differentiator: Hearthcoil Commune stands apart because its economy leans on repair salvage, heat exchange; public faith remains visible through quiet endurance rituals replace spectacle; outsiders are noticed fastest when they resemble luxury-minded visitors, unauthorized scavengers.
encounter_rhythm: Most first scenes in Hearthcoil Commune begin through weak geothermal commune rhythms: arrival, observation, minor correction, and only then deeper access.
scene_openers: A first arrival at Hearthcoil Commune immediately highlights a marginal sheresh commune surviving around unstable heat coils and strict ration discipline
The quickest social read of Hearthcoil Commune comes from how locals react to waste nothing / do not obstruct heat distribution teams.
social_misstep_examples: Treating Hearthcoil Commune like a casual stop rather than a governed space.
Ignoring local expectation to waste nothing; do not obstruct heat distribution teams.
low_grade_conflict_triggers: A queue, toll, or inspection dispute tied to repair salvage.
A local intermediary resents outsider assumptions about Hearthcoil Commune.
institutional_escalation_path: Workshop or neighborhood correction in Hearthcoil Commune
Formal notice by Communal Ration Allocators
Escalation into law, tariff, or faction attention if ignored
outsider_advantage: Outsiders can sometimes notice pressure fractures in Hearthcoil Commune before residents admit them.
outsider_liability: Outsiders in Hearthcoil Commune are judged quickly by whether they understand its governing rhythms.
public_complication_table: A minor official wants paperwork clarified.
A public argument exposes pressure around coil failure.
Someone mistakes the party for agents tied to Communal Ration Allocators.
A delay at a gate, quay, shrine, or market creates heat.
A small errand reveals a larger local imbalance.
private_pressure_table: A household or guild contact is quietly overextended.
A local fixer asks for help with a contained problem.
A hidden cost behind repair salvage surfaces.
A trusted intermediary is being watched.
A faith, law, or trade obligation has slipped.
A personal favor could become a faction debt.

arrival_variants_by_time.dawn: At dawn, Hearthcoil Commune feels procedural and watchful as daily rhythms set.
arrival_variants_by_time.midday: By midday, Hearthcoil Commune is busiest and least forgiving of confusion.
arrival_variants_by_time.night: At night, Hearthcoil Commune reveals who really moves after formal structures thin out.

recent_local_change_signal: Locals in Hearthcoil Commune mention that something small but important has changed in the last few weeks, even if they refuse to name it directly.
